title: calluna vulgaris var. pubescens
intro: Calluna vulgaris var. pubescens, also known as dwarf heather or hairy heather, is a subspecies of the heather plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Calluna vulgaris var. pubescens include reducing stress, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections, among others. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
